bugs.error_message: Wave C3: three known pricing bugs — (1) extract_impl slot3 hardcoded 4500, (2) costBoneGraft||800 conflicts with catalog default 1500, (3) ANNUAL_CHECKUP=300 hardcoded in 3 separate places instead of getClinicPrice('annualCheckup')*2
bugs.root_cause: (1) buildRestorativeResult used literal 4500 instead of c.costs.implant; (2) costGraphPanel used ||800 fallback, 2x less than catalog default 1500; (3) ANNUAL_CHECKUP top-level const evaluated once at parse time before denaiPrefs available, and duplicated in 3 files
bugs.fix: (1) normalize() adds costs.implant via priority chain, buildRestorativeResult uses c.costs.implant; (2) all costBoneGraft fallbacks use getClinicPrice('boneGraft'); (3) ANNUAL_CHECKUP removed from global scope, computed locally as getClinicPrice('annualCheckup')*2 in each function; (4) all costEngine.js/calcAI.js/clinicalEngine.js || fallbacks now use getClinicPrice(); (5) confirmNewPatient() initializes cost fields from getClinicPrice() at creation time
